question: How many customers are there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers

question: List all distinct product categories.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category

question: How many orders have status 'completed'?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

question: What is the highest product price?
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(price) FROM products

question: How many products are in the 'Electronics' category?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics'

question: List the names of customers from the US.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE country = 'US' ORDER BY name

question: What is the average product price?
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(price) FROM products

question: How many reviews gave a rating of 5?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE rating = 5

question: List the names of products priced above 100.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 100 ORDER BY name

question: How many orders were placed in 2024?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date <= '2024-12-31'

question: Total revenue per product category for completed orders.
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: Number of orders per customer country.
gold_sql: SELECT c.country, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY orders DESC

question: Average review rating per product category.
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: Top 5 products by total quantity sold.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many distinct customers placed at least one completed order?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

question: Monthly order counts for 2024.
gold_sql: SELECT substr(order_date, 1, 7) AS month, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: Revenue per month in 2024 for completed orders.
gold_sql: SELECT substr(o.order_date, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: For each category, the number of products and their average price.
gold_sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS n, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY n DESC

question: Customers who have written more than 2 reviews, with their review count.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(*) AS reviews FROM reviews r JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id GROUP BY r.customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY reviews DESC

question: Number of cancelled orders per country.
gold_sql: SELECT c.country, COUNT(*) AS cancelled FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY cancelled DESC

question: Top 5 customers by total completed spend, showing name and country.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, c.country, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS spend FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 5

question: Total profit per category for completed orders, where profit = quantity * (unit_price - cost).
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * (oi.unit_price - p.cost)) AS profit FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY profit DESC

question: Which products have never been ordered?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE product_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM order_items) ORDER BY name

question: Average order value (completed orders) per country.
gold_sql: SELECT c.country, AVG(t.order_total) AS avg_order_value FROM (SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.order_id) t JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

question: Top 3 products by revenue in 2024 (completed orders), with category.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3

question: Customers whose total completed spend is above the average completed spend across all customers.
gold_sql: WITH spend AS (SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS s FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.customer_id) SELECT c.name, sp.s AS spend FROM spend sp JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = sp.customer_id WHERE sp.s > (SELECT AVG(s) FROM spend) ORDER BY sp.s DESC

question: Average review rating for the top 5 best-selling products by quantity.
gold_sql: WITH top AS (SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS q FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY q DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT p.name, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM top JOIN products p ON p.product_id = top.product_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = top.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: Per category, the number of refunded line items and the total number of line items.
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'refunded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refunded_items, COUNT(*) AS total_items FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY refunded_items DESC

question: Monthly completed revenue in 2024 with a running cumulative total.
gold_sql: SELECT month, revenue, SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total FROM (SELECT substr(o.order_date, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND o.order_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY month) ORDER BY month

question: The single highest-spending customer overall (completed orders), with name and total spend.
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS spend FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 1
